description: An R package providing a modular, extendable system for checking research outputs for best practices.
An R package for checking registered reports and pre-registrations.
A spellchecker for statistics — automatically detects errors in reported test results.
Automated contributorship documentation using the CRediT taxonomy.
Error detection in science: consistency tests for summary statistics.
Automated detection of open data and open code statements in scientific publications.
Workflow for Open Reproducible Code in Science: R package and RStudio project template.
Extract and analyse statistical information from Word documents.
Automated extraction of author contributions from scientific publications.
Automated screening of publications for transparency indicators: open data, code, conflicts of interest, and more.
Coarsened exact matching and related methods for causal inference.
Tools for checking registered reports and pre-registrations against published results.
Automated checks for open science practices in empirical papers.
R package to decode JATS XML files and extract structured information from scientific articles.
Automated z-curve analysis for estimating replicability and discovery rates in sets of studies.
